examples.title: Sliding Window Word Count
examples.description: Count words in 30-second windows sliding every 10 seconds
examples.code:
ALGORITHM WordCount
BEGIN
  stream = readFromKafka()
  windowed = stream.window(Sliding(30s, 10s))
  counts = windowed.groupBy('word').sum('count')
  counts.writeToSink()
END
examples.explanation: Groups words into sliding intervals for continuous updates
examples.spaceComplexity: O(k) where k = unique words per window
